  • ECUs

TCU_GEN2.5_v3.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7CA
Recv ID: 7DA
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 77
Func Name: DCM Renault

  {
    "diagversion": "13",
    "supplier": "BT2",
    "soft": "1402",
    "version": "0500"

      },
      "defaultTCUtime.month": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "defaultTCUtime.seconds": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "defaultTCUtime.year": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "710300",
    "sentbytes": "310300",
    "name": "routine.sendAllDataToGDC_Start",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "routine.GDC_Status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "720300",
    "sentbytes": "320301",
    "name": "routine.sendAllDataToGDC_Stop",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "routine.GDC_Status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "710300",
    "sentbytes": "310301",
    "name": "routine.sendAllDataToGDC_RequestForStatus",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "routine.GDC_Status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 99,
    "replybytes": "62FD11",
    "sentbytes": "22FD11",
    "name": "DataRead.applicationParameters",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "applicationParameters.applicationName": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "applicationParameters.applicationVersion": {
        "firstbyte": 68,
        "ref": true
      },
      "applicationParameters.companyName": {
        "firstbyte": 36,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "700000",
    "sentbytes": "300000",
    "name": "OutputControl",
    "deny_sds": []
  }
]
